fields.title: Migrate commit/ feature
fields.description:
Move commit to tau/src/commit/

## Source
- extensions/tau/src/commit.ts

## Target
- extensions/tau/src/commit/index.ts

## Changes
- Export initCommit(pi, state) function
- Keep tool name 'git_commit_with_user_approval'
- Keep custom renderers

## DoD
- git_commit_with_user_approval tool works
- User can edit commit message
- Renders correctly
fields.close_reason: Moved commit into vertical slice (initCommit(pi, state)); kept tool name and renderers
